parameters.content:
## 1. HTTP Node
### -> Use it when
- You just need to quick, raw data (HTML, JSON, APIs).
- The website is static (no JavaScript).
- You're testing or building a simple automation.

### -> Pros : 
- Fast and free.
- No extra setup or accounts needed.
-  works great for APIs or plain Pages.

### -> Cons:
- Gives messy, Unreadable HTML.
- Can't handle JavaScript-heavy sites.
- Easy to get IP Blocked if Scraping a lot.

## 2. Firecrawl 
### -> Use it when: 
- You want to clean, readable website content.
- you're scraping modern/ dynamic sites.
- You want data from bans and errors.

### -> Pros : 
- Handles JavaScript sites easily.
- Returns clean Markdown or JSON.
- Use random proxies (avoids bans).
- Can map, search, or extract data at scale.

### -> Cons: 
- Need API Keys + small cost per crawl.
- Slightly slower than a raw HTTP request.

parameters.customBody:
{
    "aggressivePrune": false,
    "blockMedia": true,
    "clickElementsCssSelector": "[aria-expanded=\"false\"]",
    "clientSideMinChangePercentage": 15,
    "crawlerType": "playwright:adaptive",
    "debugLog": false,
    "debugMode": false,
    "expandIframes": true,
    "ignoreCanonicalUrl": false,
    "ignoreHttpsErrors": false,
    "keepUrlFragments": false,
    "proxyConfiguration": {
        "useApifyProxy": true
    },
    "readableTextCharThreshold": 100,
    "removeCookieWarnings": true,
    "removeElementsCssSelector": "nav, footer, script, style, noscript, svg, img[src^='data:'],\n[role=\"alert\"],\n[role=\"banner\"],\n[role=\"dialog\"],\n[role=\"alertdialog\"],\n[role=\"region\"][aria-label*=\"skip\" i],\n[aria-modal=\"true\"]",
    "renderingTypeDetectionPercentage": 10,
    "respectRobotsTxtFile": true,
    "reuseStoredDetectionResults": false,
    "saveFiles": false,
    "saveHtml": false,
    "saveHtmlAsFile": false,
    "saveMarkdown": true,
    "saveScreenshots": false,
    "signHttpRequests": false,
    "startUrls": [
        {
            "url": "https://docs.apify.com/academy/scraping-basics-javascript"
        }
    ],
    "storeSkippedUrls": false,
    "useLlmsTxt": false,
    "useSitemaps": false
}

parameters.content:
## 3. Apify
### -> Use it when:
- Your'e doing large-scale scrapping or complex projects(linkedIn, Amazon, etc.).
- You need built scrapers or browser automation.

### -> Pros: 
- Huge Library of pre-made scrappers("actors").
- Cloud-based (no setup).
- Handles login-based or com[lex sites.

### -> Cons :
- Can get expensive at scale.
- More setup setps for custom logic.
- Overkill for small, simple scrapes.
